name: candela-themes-tooling
description: Build and packaging tooling for the Candela light themes. The generator itself (scripts/generate.js) has zero runtime dependencies.

scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package:bundles && npm run package:intellij && npm run package:nvim && npm run package:sublime && npm run package:zed && npm run package:vscode
scripts.release:dry-run: node scripts/validate.js && npm run package && npm run package:release
